name: Khiao Ratchasi
original_name: เขี้ยวราชสีห์
overview: Dan Thai is a government spy who hides his true identity while posing as one of Kampanat’s henchmen. Kampanat, a powerful northern crime lord, runs all kinds of illegal businesses, including arms deals with Burmese minorities. Highly skilled in combat, Dan Thai is feared by gangsters everywhere.

trailers.title: Teaser : เขี้ยวราชสีห์
